content.json:
# Azure Availability SLA
Platform availability for selected Azure services over a chosen period.

- Default view is platform unavailability only (excludes user-initiated actions)
- Choose one or more resource types in the filter
- Turn on Include user actions to also show user-triggered operations in event views

Data source: AzureActivity (ResourceHealth + Administrative) and Azure Resource Graph for inventory.

parameters.name: ResourceTypes
parameters.label: Resource types
parameters.query: datatable(value:string, label:string)['vm','Virtual Machines','vmss','VM Scale Sets','appservice','App Service','swa','Static Web Apps','aks','AKS','containerapp','Container Apps','aci','Container Instances','servicefabric','Service Fabric','batch','Batch','sql','SQL Database','sqlmi','SQL Managed Instance','cosmos','Cosmos DB','postgres','PostgreSQL Flexible','mysql','MySQL Flexible','mariadb','MariaDB','synapse','Synapse Analytics','kusto','Data Explorer','adf','Data Factory','databricks','Databricks','storage','Storage Account','keyvault','Key Vault','redis','Cache for Redis','servicebus','Service Bus','eventhub','Event Hubs','eventgridtopic','Event Grid Topic','eventgriddomain','Event Grid Domain','apim','API Management','logicapps','Logic Apps (Consumption)','notificationhub','Notification Hubs','relay','Relay','signalr','SignalR','webpubsub','Web PubSub','cognitive','Cognitive Services / OpenAI','search','AI Search','appgw','Application Gateway','loadbalancer','Load Balancer','publicip','Public IP','natgw','NAT Gateway','firewall','Firewall','bastion','Bastion','privateendpoint','Private Endpoint','dnszone','DNS Zone','privatednszone','Private DNS Zone','vnetgw','VPN / ER Gateway','expressroute','ExpressRoute Circuit','frontdoor','Front Door (Classic)','cdn','CDN / Front Door Std/Premium','trafficmanager','Traffic Manager','msi','Managed Identity'] | project value, label

content.json: ## Cumulative Uptime - per Region per Month

content.query:
let DateRaw = tostring('{Date}');
let RawStart = todatetime('{Date:start}');
let RawEnd = todatetime('{Date:end}');
let RelativeDays = toint(extract('^P([0-9]+)D$', 1, DateRaw));
let RelativeHours = toint(extract('^PT([0-9]+)H$', 1, DateRaw));
let RelativeMinutes = toint(extract('^PT([0-9]+)M$', 1, DateRaw));
let RangeStart = coalesce(RawStart, iff(isnotnull(RelativeDays), now() - 1d * RelativeDays, datetime(null)), iff(isnotnull(RelativeHours), now() - 1h * RelativeHours, datetime(null)), iff(isnotnull(RelativeMinutes), now() - 1m * RelativeMinutes, datetime(null)), ago(7d));
let RangeEnd = coalesce(RawEnd, now());
let _start = startofday(iff(RangeStart <= RangeEnd, RangeStart, RangeEnd));
let _end = endofday(iff(RangeStart <= RangeEnd, RangeEnd, RangeStart));
let Types = dynamic([{ResourceTypes}]);
let TokenMap = datatable(code:string, token:string, RType:string)[
'vm','/providers/microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/','VM',
'vmss','/providers/microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets/','VMSS',
'appservice','/providers/microsoft.web/sites/','AppService',
'swa','/providers/microsoft.web/staticsites/','StaticWebApp',
'aks','/providers/microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters/','AKS',
'containerapp','/providers/microsoft.app/containerapps/','ContainerApp',
'aci','/providers/microsoft.containerinstance/containergroups/','ACI',
'servicefabric','/providers/microsoft.servicefabric/clusters/','ServiceFabric',
'batch','/providers/microsoft.batch/batchaccounts/','Batch',
'sql','/providers/microsoft.sql/servers/','SQL',
'sqlmi','/providers/microsoft.sql/managedinstances/','SQLMI',
'cosmos','/providers/microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts/','Cosmos',
'postgres','/providers/microsoft.dbforpostgresql/flexibleservers/','Postgres',
'mysql','/providers/microsoft.dbformysql/flexibleservers/','MySQL',
'mariadb','/providers/microsoft.dbformariadb/servers/','MariaDB',
'synapse','/providers/microsoft.synapse/workspaces/','Synapse',
'kusto','/providers/microsoft.kusto/clusters/','DataExplorer',
'adf','/providers/microsoft.datafactory/factories/','DataFactory',
'databricks','/providers/microsoft.databricks/workspaces/','Databricks',
'storage','/providers/microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/','Storage',
'keyvault','/providers/microsoft.keyvault/vaults/','KeyVault',
'redis','/providers/microsoft.cache/redis/','Redis',
'servicebus','/providers/microsoft.servicebus/namespaces/','ServiceBus',
'eventhub','/providers/microsoft.eventhub/namespaces/','EventHub',
'eventgridtopic','/providers/microsoft.eventgrid/topics/','EventGridTopic',
'eventgriddomain','/providers/microsoft.eventgrid/domains/','EventGridDomain',
'apim','/providers/microsoft.apimanagement/service/','APIManagement',
'logicapps','/providers/microsoft.logic/workflows/','LogicApps',
'notificationhub','/providers/microsoft.notificationhubs/namespaces/','NotificationHub',
'relay','/providers/microsoft.relay/namespaces/','Relay',
'signalr','/providers/microsoft.signalrservice/signalr/','SignalR',
'webpubsub','/providers/microsoft.signalrservice/webpubsub/','WebPubSub',
'cognitive','/providers/microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/','Cognitive',
'search','/providers/microsoft.search/searchservices/','AISearch',
'appgw','/providers/microsoft.network/applicationgateways/','AppGw',
'loadbalancer','/providers/microsoft.network/loadbalancers/','LoadBalancer',
'publicip','/providers/microsoft.network/publicipaddresses/','PublicIP',
'natgw','/providers/microsoft.network/natgateways/','NatGateway',
'firewall','/providers/microsoft.network/azurefirewalls/','Firewall',
'bastion','/providers/microsoft.network/bastionhosts/','Bastion',
'privateendpoint','/providers/microsoft.network/privateendpoints/','PrivateEndpoint',
'dnszone','/providers/microsoft.network/dnszones/','DnsZone',
'privatednszone','/providers/microsoft.network/privatednszones/','PrivateDnsZone',
'vnetgw','/providers/microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways/','VNetGateway',
'expressroute','/providers/microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits/','ExpressRoute',
'frontdoor','/providers/microsoft.network/frontdoors/','FrontDoor',
'cdn','/providers/microsoft.cdn/profiles/','CDN',
'trafficmanager','/providers/microsoft.network/trafficmanagerprofiles/','TrafficManager',
'msi','/providers/microsoft.managedidentity/userassignedidentities/','ManagedIdentity'
];
let argTypeMap = datatable(argType:string, RType:string)[
'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines','VM',
'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets','VMSS',
'microsoft.web/sites','AppService',
'microsoft.web/staticsites','StaticWebApp',
'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters','AKS',
'microsoft.app/containerapps','ContainerApp',
'microsoft.containerinstance/containergroups','ACI',
'microsoft.servicefabric/clusters','ServiceFabric',
'microsoft.batch/batchaccounts','Batch',
'microsoft.sql/servers','SQL',
'microsoft.sql/managedinstances','SQLMI',
'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts','Cosmos',
'microsoft.dbforpostgresql/flexibleservers','Postgres',
'microsoft.dbformysql/flexibleservers','MySQL',
'microsoft.dbformariadb/servers','MariaDB',
'microsoft.synapse/workspaces','Synapse',
'microsoft.kusto/clusters','DataExplorer',
'microsoft.datafactory/factories','DataFactory',
'microsoft.databricks/workspaces','Databricks',
'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts','Storage',
'microsoft.keyvault/vaults','KeyVault',
'microsoft.cache/redis','Redis',
'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces','ServiceBus',
'microsoft.eventhub/namespaces','EventHub',
'microsoft.eventgrid/topics','EventGridTopic',
'microsoft.eventgrid/domains','EventGridDomain',
'microsoft.apimanagement/service','APIManagement',
'microsoft.logic/workflows','LogicApps',
'microsoft.notificationhubs/namespaces','NotificationHub',
'microsoft.relay/namespaces','Relay',
'microsoft.signalrservice/signalr','SignalR',
'microsoft.signalrservice/webpubsub','WebPubSub',
'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts','Cognitive',
'microsoft.search/searchservices','AISearch',
'microsoft.network/applicationgateways','AppGw',
'microsoft.network/loadbalancers','LoadBalancer',
'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses','PublicIP',
'microsoft.network/natgateways','NatGateway',
'microsoft.network/azurefirewalls','Firewall',
'microsoft.network/bastionhosts','Bastion',
'microsoft.network/privateendpoints','PrivateEndpoint',
'microsoft.network/dnszones','DnsZone',
'microsoft.network/privatednszones','PrivateDnsZone',
'microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways','VNetGateway',
'microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits','ExpressRoute',
'microsoft.network/frontdoors','FrontDoor',
'microsoft.cdn/profiles','CDN',
'microsoft.network/trafficmanagerprofiles','TrafficManager',
'microsoft.managedidentity/userassignedidentities','ManagedIdentity'
];
let SelectedTokens = toscalar(TokenMap | where array_index_of(Types, code) >= 0 | summarize make_list(token));
let SelectedArgTypes = toscalar(argTypeMap | join kind=inner (TokenMap | where array_index_of(Types, code) >= 0 | project RType) on RType | summarize make_list(argType));let MatrixStart = startofmonth(_start);
let MatrixEndExclusive = startofmonth(datetime_add('month', 1, _end));
let MonthCount = datetime_diff('month', MatrixEndExclusive, MatrixStart);
let src = AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated between (_start .. _end)
| where CategoryValue == 'ResourceHealth'
| extend ResourceId = tolower(coalesce(_ResourceId, ResourceId))
| where ResourceId has_any (SelectedTokens)
| extend Props = tostring(Properties), OpName = tolower(tostring(OperationNameValue))
| extend ReasonType = tolower(tostring(extractjson('$.reasonType', Props))), Cause = tolower(tostring(extractjson('$.cause', Props)))
| where ReasonType != 'userinitiated' and Cause != 'userinitiated'
| where not(OpName has 'deallocate' or OpName has 'power off' or OpName has 'poweroff')
| extend AvailState = tostring(extractjson('$.currentHealthStatus', Props)), OccuredTime = coalesce(todatetime(extractjson('$.eventTimestamp', Props)), todatetime(extractjson('$.occuredTime', Props)), TimeGenerated), Region = coalesce(tostring(extractjson('$.resourceLocation', Props)), tostring(extractjson('$.location', Props)), tostring(ResourceGroup), 'unknown')
| order by ResourceId asc, OccuredTime asc;
src
| extend NextTimeRaw = next(OccuredTime)
| extend NextTime = coalesce(NextTimeRaw, _end)
| mv-expand m = range(0, MonthCount - 1) to typeof(int)
| extend WindowStart = startofmonth(datetime_add('month', m, MatrixStart)), WindowEnd = startofmonth(datetime_add('month', m + 1, MatrixStart))
| extend SegStart = iff(OccuredTime < WindowStart, WindowStart, OccuredTime), SegEnd = iff(NextTime > WindowEnd, WindowEnd, NextTime)
| where SegEnd > SegStart and SegStart < _end and SegEnd > _start
| extend SegSec = datetime_diff('second', SegEnd, SegStart), IsDown = AvailState != 'Available', WindowSec = datetime_diff('second', iff(WindowEnd > _end, _end, WindowEnd), iff(WindowStart < _start, _start, WindowStart)), Month = format_datetime(WindowStart, 'yyyy-MM')
| where WindowSec > 0
| summarize DownSec = sumif(SegSec, IsDown), WindowSec = max(WindowSec) by Region, Month
| extend SLA = round(((WindowSec - DownSec) * 100.0) / WindowSec, 4)
| project Region, Month, SLA
| evaluate pivot(Month, max(SLA))

content.json: ## Per-resource platform SLA for selected range

let DateRaw = tostring('{Date}');
let RawStart = todatetime('{Date:start}');
let RawEnd = todatetime('{Date:end}');
let RelativeDays = toint(extract('^P([0-9]+)D$', 1, DateRaw));
let RelativeHours = toint(extract('^PT([0-9]+)H$', 1, DateRaw));
let RelativeMinutes = toint(extract('^PT([0-9]+)M$', 1, DateRaw));

];
let SelectedTokens = toscalar(TokenMap | where array_index_of(Types, code) >= 0 | summarize make_list(token));
let SelectedArgTypes = toscalar(argTypeMap | join kind=inner (TokenMap | where array_index_of(Types, code) >= 0 | project RType) on RType | summarize make_list(argType));let WindowSec = toreal(datetime_diff('second', _end, _start));
let expectedByType = datatable(RType:string, ExpectedSLA:string, SlaBasis:string)[
'VM','99.9% / 99.95% / 99.99%','Single VM Premium SSD / Av Set / Av Zones',
'VMSS','99.95% / 99.99%','Av Set or multi-zone',

'Batch','99.9%','Standard',

'SQLMI','99.99%','Business Critical',

'Redis','99.9%','Standard / Premium',

'EventHub','99.95%','Standard',

'EventGridDomain','99.99%','Standard',

'NotificationHub','99.9%','Standard',
'Relay','99.9%','Standard',
'SignalR','99.9%','Standard',
'WebPubSub','99.9%','Standard',
'Cognitive','99.9%','Standard',
'AISearch','99.9%','Standard 2+ replicas',
'AppGw','99.95%','Standard_v2',
'LoadBalancer','99.99%','Standard SKU',
'PublicIP','99.99%','Standard SKU',
'NatGateway','99.99%','Standard',

let inventory = arg('').resources
| where tolower(type) in (SelectedArgTypes)
| project ResourceId = tolower(id), RType = tostring(case(tolower(type) == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'VM', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets', 'VMSS', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.web/sites', 'AppService', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.web/staticsites', 'StaticWebApp', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'AKS', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'ContainerApp', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.containerinstance/containergroups', 'ACI', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.servicefabric/clusters', 'ServiceFabric', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.batch/batchaccounts', 'Batch', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.sql/servers', 'SQL', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.sql/managedinstances', 'SQLMI', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'Cosmos', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.dbforpostgresql/flexibleservers', 'Postgres', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.dbformysql/flexibleservers', 'MySQL', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.dbformariadb/servers', 'MariaDB', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.synapse/workspaces', 'Synapse', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.kusto/clusters', 'DataExplorer', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.datafactory/factories', 'DataFactory', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.databricks/workspaces', 'Databricks', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'Storage', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'KeyVault', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.cache/redis', 'Redis', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'ServiceBus', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.eventhub/namespaces', 'EventHub', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.eventgrid/topics', 'EventGridTopic', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.eventgrid/domains', 'EventGridDomain', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'APIManagement', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'LogicApps', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.notificationhubs/namespaces', 'NotificationHub', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.relay/namespaces', 'Relay', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.signalrservice/signalr', 'SignalR', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.signalrservice/webpubsub', 'WebPubSub', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts', 'Cognitive', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.search/searchservices', 'AISearch', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/applicationgateways', 'AppGw', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers', 'LoadBalancer', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses', 'PublicIP', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/natgateways', 'NatGateway', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/azurefirewalls', 'Firewall', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/bastionhosts', 'Bastion', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints', 'PrivateEndpoint', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/dnszones', 'DnsZone', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/privatednszones', 'PrivateDnsZone', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways', 'VNetGateway', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits', 'ExpressRoute', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/frontdoors', 'FrontDoor', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.cdn/profiles', 'CDN', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.network/trafficmanagerprofiles', 'TrafficManager', tolower(type) == 'microsoft.managedidentity/userassignedidentities', 'ManagedIdentity', 'Other')), Region = tostring(location);
let src = AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated between (_start .. _end)
| where CategoryValue == 'ResourceHealth'
| extend ResourceId = tolower(coalesce(_ResourceId, ResourceId))
| where ResourceId has_any (SelectedTokens)
| extend Props = tostring(Properties), OpName = tolower(tostring(OperationNameValue))
| extend ReasonType = tolower(tostring(extractjson('$.reasonType', Props))), Cause = tolower(tostring(extractjson('$.cause', Props)))
| where ReasonType != 'userinitiated' and Cause != 'userinitiated'
| where not(OpName has 'deallocate' or OpName has 'power off' or OpName has 'poweroff')
| extend AvailState = tostring(extractjson('$.currentHealthStatus', Props)), OccuredTime = coalesce(todatetime(extractjson('$.eventTimestamp', Props)), todatetime(extractjson('$.occuredTime', Props)), TimeGenerated), Region = coalesce(tostring(extractjson('$.resourceLocation', Props)), tostring(extractjson('$.location', Props)), tostring(ResourceGroup), 'unknown'), RType = case(ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/', 'VM', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets/', 'VMSS', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.web/sites/', 'AppService', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.web/staticsites/', 'StaticWebApp', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters/', 'AKS', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.app/containerapps/', 'ContainerApp', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.containerinstance/containergroups/', 'ACI', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.servicefabric/clusters/', 'ServiceFabric', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.batch/batchaccounts/', 'Batch', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.sql/servers/', 'SQL', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.sql/managedinstances/', 'SQLMI', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts/', 'Cosmos', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.dbforpostgresql/flexibleservers/', 'Postgres', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.dbformysql/flexibleservers/', 'MySQL', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.dbformariadb/servers/', 'MariaDB', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.synapse/workspaces/', 'Synapse', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.kusto/clusters/', 'DataExplorer', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.datafactory/factories/', 'DataFactory', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.databricks/workspaces/', 'Databricks', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/', 'Storage', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.keyvault/vaults/', 'KeyVault', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.cache/redis/', 'Redis', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.servicebus/namespaces/', 'ServiceBus', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.eventhub/namespaces/', 'EventHub', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.eventgrid/topics/', 'EventGridTopic', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.eventgrid/domains/', 'EventGridDomain', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.apimanagement/service/', 'APIManagement', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.logic/workflows/', 'LogicApps', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.notificationhubs/namespaces/', 'NotificationHub', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.relay/namespaces/', 'Relay', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.signalrservice/signalr/', 'SignalR', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.signalrservice/webpubsub/', 'WebPubSub', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/', 'Cognitive', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.search/searchservices/', 'AISearch', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/applicationgateways/', 'AppGw', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/loadbalancers/', 'LoadBalancer', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/publicipaddresses/', 'PublicIP', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/natgateways/', 'NatGateway', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/azurefirewalls/', 'Firewall', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/bastionhosts/', 'Bastion', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/privateendpoints/', 'PrivateEndpoint', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/dnszones/', 'DnsZone', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/privatednszones/', 'PrivateDnsZone', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways/', 'VNetGateway', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits/', 'ExpressRoute', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/frontdoors/', 'FrontDoor', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.cdn/profiles/', 'CDN', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.network/trafficmanagerprofiles/', 'TrafficManager', ResourceId has '/providers/microsoft.managedidentity/userassignedidentities/', 'ManagedIdentity', 'Other')
| order by ResourceId asc, OccuredTime asc;
src
| extend NextTimeRaw = next(OccuredTime)
| extend NextTime = coalesce(NextTimeRaw, _end)
| extend SegStart = iff(OccuredTime < _start, _start, OccuredTime), SegEnd = iff(NextTime > _end, _end, NextTime)
| where SegEnd > SegStart
| extend SegSec = datetime_diff('second', SegEnd, SegStart), IsDown = AvailState != 'Available'
| summarize DownSec = sumif(SegSec, IsDown), Region = any(Region), RType = any(RType), PlatformEvents = count() by ResourceId
| join kind=fullouter hint.remote=left (inventory | project ResourceId, InvRType = RType, InvRegion = Region) on ResourceId
| extend ResourceId = coalesce(ResourceId, ResourceId1), RType = coalesce(RType, InvRType, 'Other'), Region = coalesce(Region, InvRegion, 'unknown'), DownSec = coalesce(DownSec, tolong(0)), PlatformEvents = coalesce(PlatformEvents, tolong(0))
| project-away ResourceId1, InvRType, InvRegion
| join kind=leftouter expectedByType on RType
| extend SLA = round(((WindowSec - todouble(DownSec)) * 100.0) / WindowSec, 4), UnavailableMinutes = round(todouble(DownSec) / 60.0, 2), ExpectedSLA = coalesce(ExpectedSLA, 'Unknown'), SlaBasis = coalesce(SlaBasis, 'Not mapped')
| extend ActualSLA = strcat(tostring(round(SLA, 4)), '%')
| order by SLA asc, UnavailableMinutes desc
| project ResourceId, RType, Region, ActualSLA, ExpectedSLA, SlaBasis, UnavailableMinutes, PlatformEvents

let DateRaw = tostring('{Date}');
let RawStart = todatetime('{Date:start}');
let RawEnd = todatetime('{Date:end}');
let RelativeDays = toint(extract('^P([0-9]+)D$', 1, DateRaw));
let RelativeHours = toint(extract('^PT([0-9]+)H$', 1, DateRaw));
let RelativeMinutes = toint(extract('^PT([0-9]+)M$', 1, DateRaw));
let RangeStart = coalesce(RawStart, iff(isnotnull(RelativeDays), now() - 1d * RelativeDays, datetime(null)), iff(isnotnull(RelativeHours), now() - 1h * RelativeHours, datetime(null)), iff(isnotnull(RelativeMinutes), now() - 1m * RelativeMinutes, datetime(null)), ago(7d));
let RangeEnd = coalesce(RawEnd, now());
let _start = startofday(iff(RangeStart <= RangeEnd, RangeStart, RangeEnd));
let _end = endofday(iff(RangeStart <= RangeEnd, RangeEnd, RangeStart));
let Types = dynamic([{ResourceTypes}]);
let TokenMap = datatable(code:string, token:string, RType:string)[
'vm','/providers/microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/','VM',
'vmss','/providers/microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets/','VMSS',
'appservice','/providers/microsoft.web/sites/','AppService',

'eventgriddomain','/providers/microsoft.eventgrid/domains/','EventGridDomain',
'apim','/providers/microsoft.apimanagement/service/','APIManagement',
'logicapps','/providers/microsoft.logic/workflows/','LogicApps',
'notificationhub','/providers/microsoft.notificationhubs/namespaces/','NotificationHub',
'relay','/providers/microsoft.relay/namespaces/','Relay',
'signalr','/providers/microsoft.signalrservice/signalr/','SignalR',
'webpubsub','/providers/microsoft.signalrservice/webpubsub/','WebPubSub',
'cognitive','/providers/microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/','Cognitive',

'dnszone','/providers/microsoft.network/dnszones/','DnsZone',
'privatednszone','/providers/microsoft.network/privatednszones/','PrivateDnsZone',
'vnetgw','/providers/microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways/','VNetGateway',
'expressroute','/providers/microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits/','ExpressRoute',
'frontdoor','/providers/microsoft.network/frontdoors/','FrontDoor',
'cdn','/providers/microsoft.cdn/profiles/','CDN',
'trafficmanager','/providers/microsoft.network/trafficmanagerprofiles/','TrafficManager',
'msi','/providers/microsoft.managedidentity/userassignedidentities/','ManagedIdentity'
];
let argTypeMap = datatable(argType:string, RType:string)[
'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines','VM',
'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets','VMSS',
'microsoft.web/sites','AppService',
'microsoft.web/staticsites','StaticWebApp',
'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters','AKS',
'microsoft.app/containerapps','ContainerApp',
'microsoft.containerinstance/containergroups','ACI',
'microsoft.servicefabric/clusters','ServiceFabric',
'microsoft.batch/batchaccounts','Batch',
'microsoft.sql/servers','SQL',
'microsoft.sql/managedinstances','SQLMI',
'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts','Cosmos',
'microsoft.dbforpostgresql/flexibleservers','Postgres',
'microsoft.dbformysql/flexibleservers','MySQL',
'microsoft.dbformariadb/servers','MariaDB',
'microsoft.synapse/workspaces','Synapse',
'microsoft.kusto/clusters','DataExplorer',
'microsoft.datafactory/factories','DataFactory',
'microsoft.databricks/workspaces','Databricks',
'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts','Storage',
'microsoft.keyvault/vaults','KeyVault',
'microsoft.cache/redis','Redis',
'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces','ServiceBus',
'microsoft.eventhub/namespaces','EventHub',
'microsoft.eventgrid/topics','EventGridTopic',
'microsoft.eventgrid/domains','EventGridDomain',

'microsoft.logic/workflows','LogicApps',
'microsoft.notificationhubs/namespaces','NotificationHub',
'microsoft.relay/namespaces','Relay',
'microsoft.signalrservice/signalr','SignalR',
'microsoft.signalrservice/webpubsub','WebPubSub',
'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts','Cognitive',
'microsoft.search/searchservices','AISearch',
'microsoft.network/applicationgateways','AppGw',
'microsoft.network/loadbalancers','LoadBalancer',
'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses','PublicIP',
'microsoft.network/natgateways','NatGateway',
'microsoft.network/azurefirewalls','Firewall',
'microsoft.network/bastionhosts','Bastion',
'microsoft.network/privateendpoints','PrivateEndpoint',
'microsoft.network/dnszones','DnsZone',
'microsoft.network/privatednszones','PrivateDnsZone',
'microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways','VNetGateway',
'microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits','ExpressRoute',
'microsoft.network/frontdoors','FrontDoor',
'microsoft.cdn/profiles','CDN',
'microsoft.network/trafficmanagerprofiles','TrafficManager',
'microsoft.managedidentity/userassignedidentities','ManagedIdentity'
];
let SelectedTokens = toscalar(TokenMap | where array_index_of(Types, code) >= 0 | summarize make_list(token));
let SelectedArgTypes = toscalar(argTypeMap | join kind=inner (TokenMap | where array_index_of(Types, code) >= 0 | project RType) on RType | summarize make_list(argType));let IncludeUser = tolower(tostring('{IncludeUserInitiated}')) == 'true';
let rh = AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated between (_start .. _end)
| where CategoryValue == 'ResourceHealth'
| extend ResourceId = tolower(coalesce(_ResourceId, ResourceId))
| where ResourceId has_any (SelectedTokens)
| project TimeGenerated, CategoryValue, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceId;
let admin = AzureActivity
| where IncludeUser
| where TimeGenerated between (_start .. _end)
| where CategoryValue == 'Administrative'
| extend ResourceId = tolower(coalesce(_ResourceId, ResourceId))
| where ResourceId has_any (SelectedTokens)
| project TimeGenerated, CategoryValue, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceId;
union rh, admin
| order by TimeGenerated desc
